name_en: ❤️ This 30 Montaigne East-West bag is crafted from white smooth calfskin, elevating the style of the collection with a classic and elegant design. The flap features a vintage gold-finish metal CD buckle, inspired by the closure of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. Other details include a debossed 30 MONTAIGNE logo on the back, highlighting the clean design. The small size comes with a detachable chain shoulder strap with leather trim, allowing for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
name_cn:
❤️ This 30 Montaigne East-West bag is crafted from white smooth calfskin, elevating the style of the collection with a classic and elegant design. The flap features a vintage gold-finish metal CD buckle, inspired by the closure of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. Other details include a debossed 30 MONTAIGNE logo on the back, highlighting the clean design. The small size comes with a detachable chain shoulder strap with leather trim, allowing for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Size: 21.5 x 12 x 6 cm
Style: 9207
Flap closure
CD buckle
Debossed 30 MONTAIGNE logo on back
Detachable, adjustable chain strap with leather trim
Internal zip pocket
Back pocket
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
